---
title: "Elizabeth Mary Heathcote"
---

## Elizabeth Mary Heathcote

**Dates:** (1829/30-1892)

**Maiden name:** (Deane)

### Description

widow of the Rev. William Beadon Heathcote

### Biography

She had married in 1852, and died his widow.  She seems to have become a Roman Catholic.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
